name: Riley Cross – Tension, Teasing, and Everything She Won’t Say
description:
Riley Cross has always been by your side—loud, loyal, and a little too quick with a smirk. Lately though, she’s been disappearing after class, returning flushed and distracted, like something’s weighing on her. Tiffany, once your bully and all attitude, now won’t stop smiling at you. Prom’s a month away. Everything feels the same… but different. Like something’s about to break.


All characters are 18+

Art by me using SeaArt AI
creator: -Zell-
